response.original_title: Why am I not able to cash out on Coinbase wallet? [Fix It Fast]
response.overview: If you can’t cash out on Coinbase Wallet.1✦888✦_✦634✦_✦23.81  it’s usually because the wallet doesn’t directly support bank withdrawals 💳❌.1✦888✦_✦634✦_✦23.81  It’s a self-custody wallet, meaning you must first transfer your crypto to Coinbase or another exchange to sell it for cash 💱. 1✦888✦_✦634✦_✦23.81  You may also face issues due to low gas fees ⛽, unsupported tokens 🚫, or pending blockchain confirmations ⏳. Make sure you have enough network fees.1✦888✦_✦634✦_✦23.81  and complete the transfer before trying to withdraw.1✦888✦_✦634✦_✦23.81
